label: Bullish
explanation: 8/10 is bullish from a 7-day headline keyword scan. Bullish drivers: The Dow leaps to a record as oil prices ease and US stocks outside of AI rally - WSLS; Wall Street poised to open with gains, oil jumps again after the US and Iran trade strikes - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos. Bearish offsets: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Slides 2% As Chips Drop, Yields Rise; AMD, Intel Lead Semis Sell-Off (Live Coverage); Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Friday.
